title: XQL Example Knowledge Entry
description: One curated XQL (Cortex XSIAM Query Language) example, indexed for natural-language retrieval. Entries are derived from the legacy bundles/spark/mcp/resources/xql_examples.md corpus and are searched via the runtime's knowledge_search built-in tool.

id.description: Stable, deterministic identifier (e.g. 'XQL-042-7c1ab9f3'). Used as the doc_id in <data_root>/kb.db so re-running the corpus generator is idempotent.

title.description: Human-readable example name. The KB embedder includes this in the searchable content, so titles should describe the analyst intent ('Possible Attacks against AP/Security Cameras').

category.description: Operational use-case bucket. Operators can filter knowledge_search by category to narrow noisy results.

dataset.description: XSIAM dataset the query targets, e.g. 'panw_ngfw_traffic_raw'. Extracted from the leading 'dataset = X' clause when present.

tags.description: Pipeline stages used in the query (filter, alter, comp, dedup, ...). Surfaces in the UI as filter chips.
